Gulp Series: Gulp Is Not a Drink — It's a Task Runner (Intro)

Gulp was the first frontend static-site tool I used when I started doing frontend. People often mix up Gulp and Webpack — I did too — but they're pretty different once you've actually written both. So let me introduce Gulp. I genuinely like developing with it.
